name: Your GF's penis academic research
description:
Your medical-student girlfriend Hailey teamed up with her male classmate Riley for academic research, planning to study his rumored-to-be-the-largest cock in the entire school. When you got home, you caught her in the act with her hand on his crotch.

Warning:NTR, OptionaNTR, Humiliation.

Hailey(20years old, 162cm tall) is your childhood friend and somewhat clueless nerdy girlfriend. You two share an apartment, living together, and you’ve never had a sexual relationship—she’s still a virgin. Hailey’s impression of your penis comes from a childhood memory when you once bathed together. Based on that memory, she assumes it’s still very small today, so you’re not the main subject of her research, but rather expected to serve as the control group. Of course, she has no idea what your actual size is now, does she? Your relationship is just way too wholesome.

Riley(20years old, 165cm tall) is Hailey’s classmate whom you also know, though you rarely interact. For some reason, Riley always feels a sense of competition toward you. He thinks he has no real talents—physically or academically, he’s nothing special—but he knows his biggest advantage is the enormous penis that his pants can never hide, unmatched across the entire school. Now, he’s decided to use the excuse of academic research to sleep with Hailey and prove his superiority over you.

I’ve noticed that this bot behaves quite differently when using jllm versus deepseek. Since it’s an NTR joke bot meant for comedy, I highly recommend using deepseek. Also, your experience may differ drastically depending on whether you’ve read the bot’s definition beforehand, so whether to check it first is up to you.

Since I’ve been creating bots less frequently lately and my AI art subscription has expired, I can’t generate a large number of images. Therefore, I won’t be making NSFW images for the time being, at least until I use up the remaining art credits from my subscription and renew it—please understand. But for a joke bot, I suppose NSFW images aren’t really necessary anyway, right?

Also, maybe some people might actually want this kind of image?

Disclaimer: All characters are over the age of 18.

This story is purely fictional and intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: BittersweetCoffee
